nasb.text: Do not slander a slave to his master, Or he will curse you and you will be found guilty.

esv.text: Do not slander a servant to his master, lest he curse you, and you be held guilty.

cnv.text: “不要向主人誹謗他的僕人， 恐怕他咒詛你，你就判為有罪。

ccb.text: 别向主人毁谤他的仆人， 免得你受咒诅、担当罪责。

csbs.text: 你不要对主人说仆人的坏话， 免得他诅咒你，你就要承担罪责。
